hooks.prompt:
Before completing, check if any delivery-grade files (.html, .htm, .css, .jsx, .tsx, or README.md in public repos) were created or modified during this session via Write or Edit tools. If delivery-grade files were touched, add this note at the end of your response: '---
Lingua-QC: Delivery-grade files were modified. Consider running /lingua to verify multilingual quality and encoding.' If ONLY LLM-grade files (CLAUDE.md, agent definitions, rules, configs, internal notes) were modified, say nothing about lingua-qc. If no files were modified at all, say nothing.
